description_long: This is a large, industrial yellow excavator with a robust, articulated arm and a wide, toothed digging bucket at the front. The vehicle features a spacious, enclosed operator cab with dark-tinted windows, positioned slightly to the left side of the chassis. It is equipped with four large, rugged rubber tires designed for heavy-duty urban and construction environments. The rear of the machine houses a large engine compartment with visible ventilation grilles and exhaust pipes. The arm and bucket assembly are painted in a matching yellow and gray color scheme, with hydraulic cylinders and linkages clearly visible. The branding 'Lonking' is prominently displayed on the arm, indicating the manufacturer.
description: A heavy-duty yellow wheeled excavator with a large digging bucket, enclosed cab, and visible hydraulic arm, branded 'Lonking'.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the excavator, the articulated arm, and the large bucket extended forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide bucket, front tires, and the cab centered behind the arm.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cab, arm, and bucket from the right, with engine compartment details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the engine compartment, rear tires, and the back of the cab.
